chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-346 of 2013 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of MA No.1978/2013. For hearing of MA No.6229/2013. For orders as to non-prosecution of MA No.7877/2013. For orders on MA No.5342/2014. For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant A.G. Sindh. None present for the petitioner nor intimation received. This petition was filed in the year 2013 and it came up in Court lastly on 29.04.2015 when petitioner was present in person and at her request the matter was adjourned with note of caution that the petitioner shall ensure the presence of her counsel. Thereafter this petition is pending without any progress. It shows that the petitioner has no interest in the proceedings. Consequently, instant petition is dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
